data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Demographics and segmentation', but the evidence provided does not include any specific data or metrics related to demographics or segmentation of customers. The linked use case mentions this need, but there are no details or evidence to confirm that this requirement is being met. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence provided to support the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of demographics and segmentation data.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
